# Street Name Analyzer

Next.js UI for street-name normalization: map, statistics, dictionary, about.
**Data:** The app reads the JSON files generated by the backend. You can regenerate the `src/mappings.json` and `src/evaluation.json` - for more information, refer to the 
[BE documentation](https://github.com/asidiakova/StreetNameAnalyzer).

## Run locally

Copy `.env.example` to `.env.local` and adjust. Variables are documented inline in `.env.example`.


```bash
pnpm install
pnpm dev
```

Open [http://localhost:3000](http://localhost:3000).
